AutoFormat.RemoveEmpty.RemoveNbsp TYPE: bool VERSION: 4.0.0 DEFAULT: false --DESCRIPTION-- <p> When enabled, HTML Purifier will treat any elements that contain only non-breaking spaces as well as regular whitespace as empty, and remove them when %AutoFormat.RemoveEmpty is enabled. </p> <p> See %AutoFormat.RemoveEmpty.RemoveNbsp.Exceptions for a list of elements that don't have this behavior applied to them. </p> --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
